label: UN snapback sanctions reimposed on Iran
detail: JCPOA snapback triggered; China and Russia reject the move.

label: Trump SOTU: Iran restarted nuclear program
detail: State of the Union claims Iran developing missiles capable of striking the US.

label: Joint US/Israel strikes begin
detail: Coordinated strikes on Iranian nuclear and missile infrastructure; war begins.

label: IRGC closes Strait of Hormuz
detail: Tanker traffic drops ~70%; ~150 ships anchor outside the strait.

label: Brent +10–13% to ~$80–82
detail: Immediate oil-market reaction to the strait closure.

label: Brent breaks $100 — first time in four years
detail: Supply-shock fears dominate; fastest conflict-driven rise in recent history.

label: US war cost ~$18B; Pentagon requests +$200B
detail: Direct military outlays plus supplemental request.

label: Arab-country war costs top $120B
detail: Regional economic damage accumulates alongside energy-export losses.

label: IMF cuts 2026 MENA growth 3.9% → 1.1%
detail: Warns continued escalation could push the global economy into recession.

label: Iran cancels Strait reopening
detail: Trump clarifies US blockade of Iranian ports remains in effect.

label: Trump sends negotiators to Pakistan
detail: Framed as Iran's 'last chance' to reach a deal before ceasefire expires.

label: Ceasefire expiration looms; oil rallies
detail: Markets price renewed strike risk as truce window closes.
